body:
MORNING INTEL — 2026-07-14 (snapshot 2026-07-14_2)
Regime data: VIX 16.64 | HY OAS 269 | Breadth 54.5%
AMZN: TRADE | BULLISH conf 68.33333333333333% | Range 229.58–261.62 | put_credit_spread x1
NVDA: TRADE | BULLISH conf 88.33333333333333% | Range 191.37–222.49 | put_credit_spread x2
SPY: TRADE | BULLISH conf 86.66666666666667% | Range 732.68–771.18 | put_credit_spread x1
Portfolio risk after fills: pending Artha confirmation
Discipline: 30d system PnL $0 | override PnL $0
Data quality: all sources OK

structured.takeaway: The current regime shows a moderately elevated VIX at 16.64 with a steep contango between 9-day and 3-month volatility, signaling subdued near-term fear but persistent uncertainty. SPY at $751.93 is poised for a continued climb, supported by soft inflation data and positive breadth at 54.5%, while NVDA’s $206.93 price and 39.13% IV reflect strong bullish sentiment fueled by breakthrough GPU acceleration with NVIDIA CUDA-Q, making it a prime AI play. AMZN at $245.60 holds neutral sentiment despite high IV of 44.2%, but billionaire accumulation suggests underlying strength. The key catalyst today is Fed Chair Warsh’s testimony amid slowing inflation, which could either reinforce the dovish narrative or reignite rate hike fears; watch US 2Y and 10Y yields closely for any hawkish repricing. A risk is building from earnings misses in tech, exemplified by IBM and Ericsson’s sharp declines, which could pressure broader tech sentiment if MS and JNJ results disappoint next week. Trade signal gates remain fully active, favoring tactical long exposure into the inflation and AI-driven rally.

SPY.sentiment_driver: S&P 500, Nasdaq climb after soft inflation reading

NVDA.sentiment_driver: Significant GPU Acceleration with NVIDIA CUDA-Q

AMZN.sentiment_driver: Billionaires are loading up on these superior stocks

news.title: Fed's Warsh faces lawmakers' questions as inflation slows sharply — watch live
GraniteShares Launches the First U.S.-Listed Leveraged ETFs on SK hynix
Dow opens lower; S&P 500, Nasdaq climb after soft inflation reading
Quantum X Labs Validates Continuous-Data Quantum Sampling Workflow and Achieves Significant GPU Acceleration with NVIDIA CUDA-Q
AI’s Biggest Winners Are Creating Its Biggest Losers. Here’s What It Means for Investors
Economic calendar: CPI, then testimony from Fed Chair Kevin Warsh
IBM’s stock dives toward worst day in nearly 40 years after earnings miss
Ericsson shares see worst reaction to earnings in nearly three years
Billionaires are loading up on these superior stocks. Here's why.
India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts

narratives.this_week: Bank earnings dominate this week with Morgan Stanley (MS) reporting on July 15, alongside key health care names Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) and UnitedHealth (UNH) following on July 16. Investors will focus on MS’s outlook for loan growth and trading revenue amid a stable VIX environment at 16.64 and HY spreads near 269 bps, which suggest moderate risk appetite. Positive surprises here could buoy financials broadly, supporting SPY, while health care earnings will provide sector-specific guidance with limited direct market odds.
narratives.next_week: Next week features a diverse slate with Tesla (TSLA) and AT&T (T) reporting on July 22, followed by industrials heavyweights Honeywell (HON) and Raytheon Technologies (RTX) on July 23. TSLA’s results will be pivotal for consumer discretionary sentiment and could influence AMZN given sector overlap, while T’s earnings will be a barometer for communication services. Industrial earnings will offer insight into capex trends and supply chain dynamics, potentially impacting cyclical exposure within SPY and tech-related supply chains relevant to NVDA.
narratives.next_month: The following month’s calendar is headlined by Microsoft (MSFT) and Meta (META) on July 29, with the FOMC meeting on July 30 expected to hold rates steady at 3.50%. Market focus will be on MSFT’s cloud growth and META’s advertising outlook, both critical for tech sector momentum and NVDA’s AI-driven demand narrative. Inflation data via PCE on July 31 and labor reports in early August pose downside risks to risk assets, with elevated inflation expectations likely to pressure AMZN and broader equity valuations.

bull.trigger: UNH beats revenue and EPS estimates with strong guidance
bull.implication: SPY rises modestly; minimal direct impact on NVDA and AMZN

base.trigger: UNH meets expectations with stable guidance
base.implication: SPY remains steady; no material impact on NVDA and AMZN

bear.trigger: UNH misses estimates or lowers guidance
bear.implication: SPY dips slightly; negligible effect on NVDA and AMZN

bull.trigger: TSLA beats delivery and margin expectations with upbeat outlook
bull.implication: SPY gains; NVDA benefits from AI/autonomy synergy; AMZN unaffected

base.trigger: TSLA meets expectations with cautious guidance
base.implication: SPY flat to slightly up; NVDA and AMZN unchanged

bear.trigger: TSLA misses deliveries or issues weak guidance
bear.implication: SPY falls; NVDA pressured on tech weakness; AMZN neutral

bull.trigger: MSFT beats cloud and AI revenue estimates with strong guidance
bull.implication: SPY rallies; NVDA surges on AI optimism; AMZN rises on cloud competition

base.trigger: MSFT meets expectations with stable guidance
base.implication: SPY steady; NVDA and AMZN hold gains

bear.trigger: MSFT misses estimates or weakens guidance
bear.implication: SPY declines; NVDA drops on AI concerns; AMZN dips

bull.trigger: META beats ad revenue and user growth estimates
bull.implication: SPY up; NVDA benefits from AI ad tech; AMZN neutral

base.trigger: META meets expectations with flat guidance
base.implication: SPY flat; NVDA and AMZN unaffected

bear.trigger: META misses ad revenue or user metrics
bear.implication: SPY down; NVDA pressured; AMZN neutral

prediction_markets.question: Fed funds rate after Jul 2026 meeting? — P(cut to ≤3.25%)
Fed funds rate after Jul 2026 meeting? — P(hold at 3.50%)
Fed funds rate after Jul 2026 meeting? — P(hike to ≥3.75%)

scenarios.prediction_market_summary: 93% chance Fed holds at 3.50%, 1% chance cut to ≤3.25%

bull.trigger: Fed signals dovish stance or hints at future cuts
bull.implication: SPY rallies; NVDA and AMZN gain on lower rates and growth optimism

base.trigger: Fed holds rates steady with neutral language
base.implication: SPY steady; NVDA and AMZN trade sideways

bear.trigger: Fed signals hawkish bias or rate hikes ahead

bull.trigger: AMZN beats revenue and margin estimates with strong cloud growth
bull.implication: SPY rises; AMZN surges; NVDA benefits from cloud AI demand

base.trigger: AMZN meets expectations with stable guidance
base.implication: SPY flat; AMZN and NVDA steady

bear.trigger: AMZN misses estimates or issues weak guidance
bear.implication: SPY falls; AMZN declines; NVDA pressured

prediction_markets.question: How much will core PCE increase in Aug 2026? — Above 0.2%
How much will core PCE increase in Aug 2026? — Above 0.3%
How much will core PCE increase in Aug 2026? — Above 0.4%

scenarios.prediction_market_summary: 61% chance core PCE increase above 0.2%, 63% chance above 0.3%

bull.trigger: Core PCE inflation below 0.2%, signaling easing inflation
bull.implication: SPY rallies; NVDA and AMZN gain on rate cut hopes

base.trigger: Core PCE rises around 0.2-0.3%, steady inflation
base.implication: SPY flat; NVDA and AMZN trade sideways

bear.trigger: Core PCE inflation surprises above 0.3%, indicating persistent inflation
bear.implication: SPY drops; NVDA and AMZN decline on hawkish Fed fears

bear.trigger: XOM misses earnings due to weak commodity prices

Will NVIDIA share of AI accelerator revenue (calendar 2026 H2) exceed 80%?

scenarios.prediction_market_summary: 46% chance AMD MI300+ series ships ≥$10B in 2026; 70% chance NVIDIA >80% AI accelerator share in H2 2026

prediction_markets.question: Will July 2026 U.S. nonfarm payroll employment increase by at least 150,000?
Will August 2026 U.S. nonfarm payroll employment increase by at least 150,000?
Will September 2026 U.S. nonfarm payroll employment increase by at least 150,000?

bull.trigger: NFP beats expectations with strong job growth

bear.implication: SPY declines; NVDA and AMZN fall on hawkish Fed fears
